title: Verify the cancellation flow when the user declines the 'Incentive Offer'
description: Tests that a user who persists in canceling and declines the discount offer successfully cancels their trial and loses access immediately.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.
The 'Incentive Offer' is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' Hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. In the 'Incentive Offer' pop-up, click the secondary 'Cancel Anyway' option.
5. Navigate back to the homepage or Trial Corner.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately canceled. The homepage widget updates to the 'cancelled trial' design. All premium content in the Trial Corner becomes locked. The `feedback-popup-viewed` event is triggered.
